title: StudioBrain Layout Schema
description: JSON Schema for *.layout.json files under templates/Layouts/. A layout describes how an entity editor renders its fields: sections, columns, field widgets, plugin slots, and view configuration.

entity_type.description: Entity type this layout renders. Must match an entity_type in schemas/_base.json.

version.description: Layout format version. Accepts MAJOR.MINOR ('1.0') or full semver MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH ('1.0.0').

compat.description: Compatibility metadata. min_core_version is required so the installer can refuse layouts targeting a newer core than is running.

sections.description: Ordered list of layout sections. Each section is a panel/group in the editor.

id.description: Section identifier; must be unique within the layout. Snake_case or kebab-case (auto-generated block IDs may be 'block_<timestamp>').

title.description: Optional human-readable section title. May be null when the section is a pure component slot.

icon.description: Optional icon identifier (lucide icon name or plugin-provided).

columns.description: Number of grid columns for field layout (typically 1, 2, or 3).

collapsed_default.description: Whether the section is collapsed by default in the UI.

fields.description: Form fields rendered inside this section. Null when the section is a component slot.

component.description: Component identifier for non-field sections (e.g. 'entity-workflow-trigger', 'plugin:<plugin>:<component>', 'entity-assets'). Null for field sections.

component_config.description: Free-form configuration passed to the component.

component_source.description: Source of the component ('builtin', a plugin id, etc.).

updated_at.description: Optional ISO-8601 timestamp the layout was last edited.

created_at.description: Optional ISO-8601 timestamp the layout was created.

key.description: Frontmatter key this field binds to. May use dotted paths (e.g. 'color_palette.primary') for nested fields.

label.description: Human-readable label shown above the field.

ui_component.description: Widget registry identifier (text, textarea, number, select, multi_select, toggle, read-only-text, image-upload, color-picker, markdown, entity-reference, ...). 'plugin:<plugin>:<widget>' is reserved for plugin-provided widgets.

required.description: Whether the user must fill this field.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown when the field is empty.

help.description: Help text shown under the field.

default.description: Default value when the entity is created with no value supplied. Type depends on ui_component.

options_source.description: Reference to a dynamic options source (e.g. 'enum:faction' or 'plugin:<plugin>:<fn>').

auto_generate_from.description: When set, the field value is auto-generated from the referenced field (e.g. id from name).

rows.description: For textarea widgets: visible row count.

validation.description: Inline validation hints (regex, min/max length, etc.).
